question: Which one of the following flight(s) is considered neither a "recreation purpose" nor "education purpose"? I. A volunteer using a UA to take photographs and videos for a charity event. II. A company's public communications department using a UA to take event photographs III. An individual flying a UA higher than 200 feet above mean sea level for aerial photography for personal collection. IV. Students of a public educational institute showcasing their UA as part of a school event that is not open to the public.
